description_long: This barn is a modern, rectangular structure with a dark, gabled roof and clean, angular lines. The exterior is clad in vertical panels, giving it a contemporary yet agricultural appearance. There is a prominent main entrance with a single, wide door and several windows of varying sizes distributed across the facade, some grouped and others isolated. A smaller, detached outbuilding or garage is positioned adjacent to the main barn, connected by a short walkway. The barn sits on a flat, grassy plot, and features a small covered porch area at one end. The overall design blends traditional barn elements with modern architectural features.
description: A modern barn with a dark gabled roof, vertical panel siding, and a mix of windows and doors, accompanied by a detached outbuilding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long vertical panel siding, a small porch area, and the adjacent outbuilding.
description_view_1: Narrow end view highlighting the angular roofline and the connection between the barn and the outbuilding.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main entrance, several windows, and the relationship between the barn and the outbuilding.
description_view_3: Rear view showing large windows and the full length of the barn's gabled roof.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with intersecting gable extension
attribute_door_style: single wide hinged door at the main entrance, with additional standard doors on the outbuilding
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple windows of varying sizes, some grouped and others isolated, distributed across the facade and rear
attribute_architectural_style: contemporary barn with modern agricultural influences
